parts.text:
following administrative positions:
* reviewer roles in funding agencies: Instituto de Matemática Pura e Aplic
ada (2023 - Present), L'Oréal-UNESCO-ABC (2023 - Present), Instituto Alberto Luiz Coimbra de Pós Graduação e Pesquisa de Engenharia (2013 - 2023),

Conselho Nacional de Desenvolvimento Científico e Tecnológico (2024 - Present), and Conselho Nacional de Desenvolvimento Científico e Tecnológico (2012 - 2015).

The provided information does not specify if the researcher has
held positions such as course coordinator, department chair, academic unit director, or coordinator of a stricto sensu graduate program.
